name: QC Generator v6.2
description: This is an improved and fan-made version of QC Gen. The application includes features such as changing the background color, switching languages, defining bones, and things like VTA and similar tools. This is a fan-made version of QC Gen.

name: Filmmaker GUI 3.7
description: Comprehensive SFM script— fog, skybox, light limit patch, auto lip sync, VMT editor, texture checker, RAM/FPS boost, overlay system & more. 12 languages supported. Runs directly inside Source Filmmaker.
